msContents.summary:
[p]Henry Daniel, [i]Liber uricrisiarum[/i], in English[/p]
[p]Written in an upright formal hand; 36 lines to a page. On f. 55r is an unfinished pen-drawn diagram of the geocentric universe.[/p]
[p][b]Contents[/b][/p]
[p]1. ff. 1r-70v Henry Daniel, [i]Liber uricrisiarum[/i], in English, prologue and end wanting (ends with part of the eighth chapter of the second book).[/p]
[p]f. 1r The firste boke. The firste chapiture. [U]ryne ys as mekyll to say yn ynglysche as on yn the Reynys. Reynys frenche Renes latyn lendys in englysche ... f. 70v ... eucomia yt seth gude dygestione or ellis mene And the ... [/p]

msItem.author: Written by a scribe probably from the north of England.
msItem.title: Henry Daniel, [i]Liber uricrisiarum[/i], in English
msItem.filiation: Anglo-Saxon letter forms in Moorat's catalogue description (such as contraction marks and thorn and yogh symbols) have been replaced with Latin characters.

objectDesc.supportDesc: 1 volume70 ll. folio. 29 x 20 cm. On vellum. The first leaf, and the end, are missing; lower margins badly cockled, with loss of text.

binding.p: 70 ll. folio. 29 x 20 cm. On vellum. The first leaf, and the end, are missing; lower margins badly cockled, with loss of text.

bibl.title: Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library
bibl.author: S. A. J. Moorat
bibl.publisher: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine

custodialHist.custEvent: Catalogue description modified in 2014. For original description, see S.A.J. Moorat, [i]Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library[/i] (London: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine, 1962-1973).

listBibl.bibl:
[p][b]Bibliography[/b][/p]
[p]Eimas, Richard. [i]Heirs of Hippocrates: the development of medicine in a catalogue of historic books in the Hardin Library for the Health Sciences, the University of Iowa[/i] (Iowa City: University of Iowa, 1990), p. 57.[/p]
[p]Hanna, Ralph. [i]The Index of Middle English Prose Handlist I: Manuscripts in the Henry E. Huntington Library[/i] (Woodbridge: Boydell and Brewer, 2007), p. 33.[/p]
[p]Tavormina, M. Teresa. [i]Uroscopy in Middle English: a Guide to the Texts and Manuscripts[/i] (University of Michigan Studies in Medieval and Renaissance History, 2014), p. 90.[/p]
[p]Jasin, Joanne. 'A Critical Edition of the Middle English [i]Liber uricrisiarum[/i] in Wellcome MS 225', (Unpublished PhD thesis, Tulane University, 1983).[/p]

revisionDesc.change: Transformed Calm xml export to TEI xml file using a transformation scenario
Manual edits following automated Calm-TEI transformation
